name: mutter
description: Mutter AI workspace: orchestration, incremental indexing, tasks, plans, task status dashboards, and token-efficient context for large projects (Codex).

interface.longDescription: Use Mutter for incremental scans, index-first navigation, tasks and plans, checklist status via tasks-status/sync-task-progress, safe editing, reviews, and multi-worker workflows with low token use.
defaultPrompt: Run a Mutter incremental scan and summarize what changed.
Show task checklist progress with mutter tasks-status.
Create or update a Mutter task for the current goal.
